3157400.name: Sunset Arena Demo
3157400.description:
Sunset Arena is a casual party game meant to bring the party with you. With only a Steam deck or similar device, you can challenge a friend. Inspired from coffee table style games. But the fun doesn't stop there! Play up to 8 players* with only 4 controllers, each person only needs a single joystick with coffee table mode. Disable to use up to 8 controllers so everyone can play couch mode! Simple gameplay for anyone to enjoy. Your player will automatically shoot at the closest target, just control movement.

*Demo is limited to 4 players, and has maps, and game mode selection limited.
